_publications._publicationTitle: The Relationship Between Heart Rate Variability, Psychological Flexibility, and Pain in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: The test of the indirect effect of HF-HRV on pain interference through psychological inflexibility was significant (path ab: 95% CI −0.09 to −0.1; F (2, 15) = 6.05, P < 0.05)
details: Successfully detected significant indirect effect of HF-HRV on pain interference through psychological inflexibility (95% CI −0.09 to −0.1; F(2, 15) = 6.05, P < 0.05)
